scripts.format: oxfmt .github/workflows/autofix.yml .vscode .oxfmtrc.json oxlint.config.ts package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml && pnpm --loglevel=error -r format
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --list-different .github/workflows/autofix.yml .vscode .oxfmtrc.json oxlint.config.ts package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml && pnpm --loglevel=error -r format:check
